- Escape a literal etxt or EOF line in prose or content as /etxt or /EOF.

280‚Üí@app.get("/attendance/export")
281‚Üíasync def export_attendance_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
282‚Üí    import pandas as pd
283‚Üí    if not month:
284‚Üí        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
285‚Üí    workers = db.query(models.Operator).filter(models.Operator.is_active == 1).all()
286‚Üí    records = db.query(models.Attendance).filter(models.Attendance.date.like(f"{month}%")).all()
287‚Üí    lookup = {}
288‚Üí    for r in records:
289‚Üí        lookup[(r.worker_id, r.date)] = r.status
290‚Üí    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
291‚Üí    import calendar
292‚Üí    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
293‚Üí    rows = []
294‚Üí    for w in workers:
295‚Üí        row = {"Ism": w.name, "Lavozim": w.position, "Smena": w.shift_type}
296‚Üí        present_count = 0
297‚Üí        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
298‚Üí            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
299‚Üí            status = lookup.get((w.id, date_str), "")
300‚Üí            if status == "PRESENT":
301‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "+"
302‚Üí                present_count += 1
303‚Üí            elif status == "ABSENT":
304‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "-"
305‚Üí            elif status == "REST":
306‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "D"
307‚Üí            else:
308‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = ""
309‚Üí        row["Jami ish kuni"] = present_count
310‚Üí        rows.append(row)
311‚Üí    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
312‚Üí    output = io.BytesIO()
313‚Üí    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
314‚Üí        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Tabel {month}')
315‚Üí    output.seek(0)
316‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
317‚Üí                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=tabel_{month}.xlsx"})

401‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ MACHINES ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
402‚Üí@app.get("/machines")
403‚Üíasync def read_machines(db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
404‚Üí    machines = db.query(models.Machine).all()
405‚Üí    results = []
406‚Üí    now = datetime.utcnow()
407‚Üí    for m in machines:
408‚Üí        remaining = max(0.0, m.initial_asnova_length - (m.current_total_meters - m.meters_at_fill))
409‚Üí        is_esp_online = m.last_seen and (now - m.last_seen).total_seconds() < 60
410‚Üí        if not is_esp_online:
411‚Üí            status = "OFFLINE"
412‚Üí        elif m.current_baud == 0:
413‚Üí            status = "ESP_ONLINE_NO_SIGNAL"
414‚Üí        elif remaining <= 0:
415‚Üí            status = "ASNOVA_EMPTY"
416‚Üí        else:
417‚Üí            status = "RUNNING"
418‚Üí        results.append({
419‚Üí            "id": m.id, "status": status, "category_id": m.category_id,
420‚Üí            "meters": round(m.current_total_meters, 2), "shift_meters": round(m.shift_meters, 2),
421‚Üí            "remaining": round(remaining, 2), "initial_asnova_length": m.initial_asnova_length,
422‚Üí            "meters_at_fill": m.meters_at_fill, "baud": m.current_baud, "protocol": m.current_protocol,
423‚Üí            "connection_source": m.connection_source, "preferred_source": m.preferred_source,
424‚Üí            "last_seen": m.last_seen.isoformat() if m.last_seen else None,
425‚Üí            "sys_info": {
426‚Üí                "ram": {"free": m.esp_free_ram, "total": m.esp_total_ram},
427‚Üí                "rom": {"free": m.esp_free_rom, "total": m.esp_total_rom},
428‚Üí                "cpu": m.esp_cpu_freq,
429‚Üí                "wifi": {"ssid": m.esp_wifi_ssid, "rssi": m.esp_wifi_rssi}
430‚Üí            }
431‚Üí        })
432‚Üí    return results

599‚Üí# ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ MONTHLY REPORT ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
600‚Üí@app.get("/reports/monthly/excel")
601‚Üíasync def get_monthly_report_excel(month: Optional[str] = None, db: Session = Depends(database.get_db), current_user: models.User = Depends(get_current_user)):
602‚Üí    import pandas as pd
603‚Üí    import calendar
604‚Üí    if not month:
605‚Üí        month = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y-%m")
606‚Üí    year, mon = map(int, month.split('-'))
607‚Üí    days_in_month = calendar.monthrange(year, mon)[1]
608‚Üí
609‚Üí    operators = db.query(models.Operator).filter(models.Operator.is_active == 1, models.Operator.position == "Operator").all()
610‚Üí
611‚Üí    # Get all daily plans for this month
612‚Üí    plans = db.query(models.DailyPlan).filter(models.DailyPlan.date.like(f"{month}%")).all()
613‚Üí    plan_map = {}
614‚Üí    for p in plans:
615‚Üí        key = (p.operator_id, p.date)
616‚Üí        if key not in plan_map:
617‚Üí            plan_map[key] = {"plan": 0, "actual": 0}
618‚Üí        plan_map[key]["plan"] += p.plan_meters
619‚Üí        plan_map[key]["actual"] += p.actual_meters
620‚Üí
621‚Üí    # Get assignments
622‚Üí    assignments = db.query(models.Assignment).filter(models.Assignment.is_active == 1).all()
623‚Üí    op_machines = {}
624‚Üí    for a in assignments:
625‚Üí        if a.operator_id not in op_machines:
626‚Üí            op_machines[a.operator_id] = []
627‚Üí        op_machines[a.operator_id].append(a.machine_id)
628‚Üí
629‚Üí    rows = []
630‚Üí    for op in operators:
631‚Üí        machines = op_machines.get(op.id, [])
632‚Üí        row = {"Operator": op.name, "Stanoklar": ", ".join(machines) if machines else "‚Äî"}
633‚Üí        total_plan = 0
634‚Üí        total_actual = 0
635‚Üí        for d in range(1, days_in_month + 1):
636‚Üí            date_str = f"{month}-{d:02d}"
637‚Üí            key = (op.id, date_str)
638‚Üí            info = plan_map.get(key, {"plan": 0, "actual": 0})
639‚Üí            plan_val = info["plan"]
640‚Üí            actual_val = info["actual"]
641‚Üí            if plan_val > 0:
642‚Üí                pct = round((actual_val / plan_val) * 100, 0) if plan_val > 0 else 0
643‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = f"{int(actual_val)}/{int(plan_val)} ({int(pct)}%)"
644‚Üí            else:
645‚Üí                row[f"{d}"] = "‚Äî"
646‚Üí            total_plan += plan_val
647‚Üí            total_actual += actual_val
648‚Üí        row["Jami reja"] = int(total_plan)
649‚Üí        row["Jami bajarildi"] = int(total_actual)
650‚Üí        row["Umumiy %"] = round((total_actual / total_plan) * 100, 1) if total_plan > 0 else 0
651‚Üí        rows.append(row)
652‚Üí
653‚Üí    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
654‚Üí    output = io.BytesIO()
655‚Üí    with pd.ExcelWriter(output, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
656‚Üí        df.to_excel(writer, index=False, sheet_name=f'Operator {month}')
657‚Üí    output.seek(0)
658‚Üí    return StreamingResponse(output, media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
659‚Üí                            headers={"Content-Disposition": f"attachment; filename=operator_report_{month}.xlsx"})
